creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Thanks Yuri Victorovich for raising issues in this PR to upstream developer(s), which were resolved for 3.3.1 version. Otherwise, they were fixed, but by different way.
Thanks Kurt Jaeger for timely tests and commit.
Overall, while last proposed patch was submitted by me, it's a collaborative work of persons in this PR and related one (bug 193528).
